A version that mixed both recordings together was used when the series became available on YouTube. It was first released on CD on July 6, 2022, then again as part of ULTRA GALAXY FIGHT Original Soundtrack on August 3.

Info_Detail: Artist: Takuma Terashima | Released: 2019 | Album: Ultraman Taiga Original Soundtrack
Deskripsi: Buddy, steady, go! is the opening theme of Ultraman Taiga. Its TV size version was first released in the Ultraman Taiga Original Soundtrack album, then the full song was released as a single with two other songs written by Takuma Terashima on August 28, 2019. A limited edition version of the single was released on the same day, which contains a second disc featuring the official music video for the song. In 2020, the song was included on Terashima's fourth album, ASSEMBLE.
